categories.name: 材料科学
categories.desc: 创造并处理材料，以提高其实用性和耐用性。
categories.desc_en: The creation and manipulation of materials for increased utility and durability.

categories.name: 推进力学

categories.desc_en: The study of propulsion and trajectory.

categories.name: 宇航技术
categories.desc: 太空是终极边界，掌握它就掌握了未来。
categories.desc_en: Space is the final frontier. To master it is to master the future.

categories.name: 力场操控
categories.desc: 迫使基本力遵从我们的意志。
categories.desc_en: Bending fundamental forces to our will.

categories.name: 粒子物理
categories.desc: 隔绝并利用微粒物质和现象。
categories.desc_en: Isolating and utilizing particulate matter and phenomena.

categories.name: 治国术
categories.desc: 打造一个成功社会的艺术。
categories.desc_en: The art of building a successful society.

categories.name: 生物学
categories.desc: 研究纷繁的形式与复杂性生命的科学
categories.desc_en: The science of life, in its many forms and complexities.

categories.name: 军事理论

categories.desc_en: The art of war and its many important aspects.

categories.name: 远古学
categories.desc: 过往埋藏的科技遗珠亟待发掘。
